welcome.title: Welcome to Nbamon
welcome.description: An online NBA-themed multiplayer game. Choose your player, explore the map and enter combat when you collide with another player.
welcome.step1: Choose your player: select one of the 6 NBA stars.
welcome.step2: Explore the map: use the arrow keys, WASD or the buttons to move.
welcome.step3: Combat: when you collide with another player, enter rock-paper-scissors combat (DUNK > PASS > BLOCK > DUNK).
welcome.step4: Best of 5: win 3 out of 5 rounds to victory.

selectPlayer.title: N B A M O N
selectPlayer.subtitle: Choose your player
selectPlayer.instructions: Your character will appear on the map. Move to find another player and, when you collide, enter combat.

map.title: Explore the map
map.instructions: Move your character to find another player. When you collide, you will enter combat.
map.controls: Arrow keys, WASD or buttons to move

combat.title: N B A M O N
combat.subtitle: Choose your shot:

status.botCountdown: Player not found. Bot will be generated in {{seconds}} seconds!
status.botCountdownSingular: Player not found. Bot will be generated in {{seconds}} second!

errors.serverConnection: Could not connect to server. Make sure it is running.
